keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY SEXUAL IMPULSE. Sexual impulse, decreased : Bar-c., Caust., Grap., Lyc., Nat-m., Onos., Pho-ac., Sul. Sexual impulse, decreased, female : Grap., Nat-m. Sexual impulse, erections : Canth., Grap., Merc., Nat-c., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pic-ac., Plat., Pul., Thu. Sexual impulse, erections, deficient, falling : Arg-n., Bar-c., Con., Lyc., Sul. Sexual impulse, erections, painful : Canth., Merc., Nux-v. Sexual impulse, impotency , sexual weakness : Ag-c., Calad., Con., Lyc., Sele. Sexual impulse, increased : Canth., Carb-v., Chin., Nux-v., Pho., Plat., Pul., Sil., Stram., Ver-a. Sexual impulse, increased, with physical weakness : Calc-c., Kali-c., Pho. Sexual impulse, nymphomania : Ag-c., Hyo., Plat. Sexual impulse, sterility : Aur., Bor., Merc., Nat-m., Pho. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
